description_long: This handgun features a striking two-tone design with a predominantly black grip and lower frame, contrasted by a silver slide adorned with aggressive, stylized graphics resembling jagged teeth and a red, menacing eye motif on both sides. The grip is ergonomically contoured, appearing to be made of textured polymer for secure handling, while the slide is likely constructed from metal, giving it a robust and durable appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement and enhanced safety. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without any visible extensions or flares. The slide has minimal external markings aside from the decorative artwork, and the barrel is not visibly threaded or ported, suggesting a standard configuration. Overall, the handgun's design is modern and visually impactful, likely intended to stand out in an urban environment.
description: A modern handgun with a black ergonomic grip and a silver slide featuring bold, stylized teeth and eye graphics. The design is sleek, with a flush magazine base and minimal external markings.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the top, highlighting the silver slide and the black grip, with the aggressive graphic design partially visible along the slide.
description_view_1: The left side view showcases the full extent of the stylized teeth and red eye graphic, as well as the ergonomic grip and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The front view emphasizes the width of the slide and grip, with the muzzle and front sight visible, and the graphic design wrapping around the slide.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the same bold teeth and eye motif, along with the smooth, contoured grip and flush magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured and ergonomic, constructed from a matte black polymer material with a subtle texture for enhanced grip. It features gentle finger grooves and a slight palm swell for comfort, with no visible logos or embellishments. The surface appears smooth but grippy, designed for secure handling during use.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a generous opening for finger access. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its curvature is standard, lacking any undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is functional and unembellished.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and profile, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. It is integrated seamlessly into the slide, with a smooth exterior and a matching silver finish. No external markings or special features are apparent on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide is decorated with a bold, stylized graphic of jagged black teeth and a red eye on both sides, occupying the forward portion. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations; the artwork is the primary visual element.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the design is simple and functional.
